contract.name: v2/autocomplete/psc.md
contract.description: Retrieves Product or Service Codes (PSC) and descriptions matching autocomplete search text.

search_text.description: Search string matched against PSC codes and descriptions; full four-character codes return exact code matches while description fragments surface related PSC entries.
search_text.constraints: Required; must be provided as a JSON string. Empty string yields 400 'Missing one or more required request parameters: search_text'. Whitespace-only strings return 200 with an empty results array. Arrays are accepted but return an empty results array. Numeric or boolean values trigger a 500 HTML error. Null or omission returns the same 400 missing-parameter error.

limit.description: Maximum number of autocomplete suggestions to include in the response.
limit.constraints: Optional; defaults to 10. Floats truncate toward zero (e.g., 2.5→2, 0.7→0). Boolean values coerce to 1 (true) or 0 (false). Zero is allowed and returns an empty results array. Negative or null values produce a 500 HTML error. Non-numeric strings (including decimal strings) return 400 'Limit request parameter is not a valid, positive integer'. Limits above the catalog size simply return the full 3,627-row PSC catalog (~370 KB).

results.description: Autocomplete matches ordered by backend relevance; length never exceeds the smaller of the provided limit and the 3,627-row PSC catalog.

product_or_service_code.description: PSC code matching the search criteria.

psc_description.description: PSC description associated with the code.

results.psc_description: NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; BASIC RESEARCH
NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; APPLIED RESEARCH

body.detail: Limit request parameter is not a valid, positive integer

quirks: Float limit values truncate toward zero (2.5→2 results, 0.7→0), and boolean limits coerce to 1 or 0.
Limit value 0 is accepted and returns an empty results array.
Null or negative limit values trigger 500 HTML responses instead of JSON validation errors.
search_text arrays are accepted but return an empty results array instead of erroring.
Numeric or boolean search_text values surface a 500 HTML error page.
Request bodies sent without a JSON Content-Type header can be treated as missing search_text (400).
Large limits return the entire PSC catalog (3,627 rows, ~370 KB) without pagination.
Partial PSC code prefixes shorter than four characters do not match; full codes are required for code lookups.
risks: Clients must sanitize search_text and limit types to avoid backend 500 HTML responses instead of JSON errors.
Large limit values return the full PSC catalog (3,627 rows, ~370 KB) in one response with no pagination guidance.
Error responses may be HTML (500) or JSON (400); consumers must handle multiple content types.
gaps: Result relevance ordering is undocumented and may change without notice.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results": [{"product_or_service_code": "AC", "psc_description": "C \u2013 National Defense R&D Services"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC11", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; BASIC RESEARCH"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC12", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; APPLIED RESEARCH"}]}

probes.notes: pass – default call returns 10 defense-related PSC entries (default limit 10).

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results": [{"product_or_service_code": "AC", "psc_description": "C \u2013 National Defense R&D Services"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC11", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; BASIC RESEARCH"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC12", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; APPLIED RESEARCH"}]}

probes.notes: pass – limit parameter trims response to requested count.
pass – limit 0 is accepted but produces an empty result set.
fail – negative limit triggers 500 HTML error instead of validation response.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results": [{"product_or_service_code": "AC", "psc_description": "C \u2013 National Defense R&D Services"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC11", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; BASIC RESEARCH"}]}

probes.notes: pass – float limit is truncated to an integer (2.5 → 2 results).

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results": [{"product_or_service_code": "AC", "psc_description": "C \u2013 National Defense R&D Services"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC11", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; BASIC RESEARCH"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC12", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; APPLIED RESEARCH"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC13", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; EXPERIMENTAL DEVELOPMENT"}, {"product_or_service_code": "AC14", "psc_description": "NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE - MILITARY; R&D ADMINISTRATIVE EXPENSES"}]}

probes.notes: pass – numeric string limit is coerced to an integer successfully.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results": [{"product_or_service_code": "10", "psc_description": "WEAPONS"}, {"product_or_service_code": "1040", "psc_description": "CHEMICAL WEAPONS AND EQUIPMENT"}, {"product_or_service_code": "1045", "psc_description": "LAUNCHERS, TORPEDO AND DEPTH CHARGE"}]}

probes.notes: pass – limit 5000 returns the full PSC catalog (3,627 rows, ~370 KB payload).
fail – numeric search_text triggers a 500 HTML error instead of validation feedback.
fail – boolean search_text triggers the same 500 HTML error path as numeric values.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail": "Missing one or more required request parameters: search_text"}

probes.notes: fail – empty JSON body returns the missing search_text error.

mismatches: Docs describe limit as an optional number, but the backend requires a positive integer; decimal strings and other non-integers receive 'Limit request parameter is not a valid, positive integer'.
Negative or null limit values yield 500 Server Error HTML responses instead of the documented validation handling.
gaps: Result relevance ordering is undocumented and may change without notice.
risks: Clients must sanitize search_text and limit types to avoid backend 500 HTML responses instead of JSON errors.
Large limit values return the full PSC catalog (3,627 rows, ~370 KB) in one response with no pagination guidance.
Error responses may be HTML (500) or JSON (400); consumers must handle multiple content types.
